name: Stereo I/O 1U
description: All-in-one stereo audio interface for Intellijel cases. Balanced stereo line input with gain switch, stereo cue and main inputs, headphone output with independent level and source selection, and balanced stereo line output.

controls.name: Input Gain Switch
controls.description: Sets gain for the EXT OUT patch points from rear-panel line input.

controls.name: HP Monitor Switch
controls.description: Selects headphone source: CUE input only, or module OUT only.
controls.detail: Left = CUE In · Right = Module Out

controls.name: Module Out Switch
controls.description: Sets module output source: CUE + MAIN summed, or MAIN only.
controls.detail: Left = CUE + MAIN · Right = MAIN only

controls.name: Headphone Level
controls.description: Attenuator knob for headphone output level.

controls.name: Main Output Level
controls.description: Attenuator knob for main balanced stereo line output level.
controls.detail: Log taper attenuator · controls BAL-OUT and UNBAL-OUT

inputs.name: CUE L / CUE R
inputs.description: Patch inputs for cue monitoring feed. Left normals to right for mono.

inputs.name: MAIN L / MAIN R
inputs.description: Patch inputs routed to rear balanced line output. Left normals to right.

outputs.name: EXT L / EXT R
outputs.description: Rear-panel line input converted to modular level. Gain set by Input Gain Switch.

outputs.name: Headphone Out
outputs.description: TRS stereo headphone output. Source selectable via HP Monitor Switch.

behaviors.name: Line Input to Patch
behaviors.trigger: signal at rear BAL-IN or UNBAL-IN
behaviors.description: External line-level audio (from mixer, FX unit, synth, etc.) enters via rear connectors, gain-adjusted by the Input Gain Switch, and appears at EXT L/R patch points on the front panel.

behaviors.name: Patch to Line Output
behaviors.description: Eurorack audio patched into MAIN L/R is attenuated by the Main Output Level knob and sent to the rear balanced (BAL-OUT) and unbalanced (UNBAL-OUT) connectors for connection to mixers or interfaces.

behaviors.name: Cue Monitoring
behaviors.description: A cue feed patched to CUE L/R can be monitored through headphones (HP Switch = CUE) independently of the main output, or summed with the main output (Module Out Switch = CUE+MAIN).

behaviors.name: Headphone Monitoring
behaviors.description: Headphone output has its own level control and source selection (CUE or module OUT). Also feeds the rear PHONES-OUT connector for use with compatible Intellijel modules.

patchIdeas.name: Groovebox integration
patchIdeas.patch: Groovebox stereo out → rear BAL-IN · EXT L/R → effects chain → MAIN L/R → mix out
patchIdeas.diagram:
STEREO I/O 1U:
* Input Gain Switch: 0dB
- Groovebox (Out L) -> Stereo I/O (rear BAL-IN L)
- Groovebox (Out R) -> Stereo I/O (rear BAL-IN R)
- Stereo I/O (EXT L) -> FX (In L)
- Stereo I/O (EXT R) -> FX (In R)
- FX (Out L) -> Stereo I/O (MAIN L)
- FX (Out R) -> Stereo I/O (MAIN R) // groovebox processed through modular FX

patchIdeas.name: Silent cue monitoring
patchIdeas.patch: Pre-mix signal → CUE L/R · HP Switch = CUE · monitor without affecting main out
patchIdeas.diagram:
STEREO I/O 1U:
* HP Monitor Switch: CUE In
- Mixer (Aux L) -> Stereo I/O (CUE L)
- Mixer (Aux R) -> Stereo I/O (CUE R) // audition in headphones, silent on main

patchIdeas.name: Live stereo FX insert
patchIdeas.patch: EXT L/R (from rear input) → reverb module → MAIN L/R → BAL-OUT to PA
patchIdeas.diagram:
STEREO I/O 1U:
* Input Gain Switch: +6dB
- Stereo I/O (EXT L) -> Reverb (In L)
- Stereo I/O (EXT R) -> Reverb (In R)
- Reverb (Out L) -> Stereo I/O (MAIN L)
- Reverb (Out R) -> Stereo I/O (MAIN R) // live stereo reverb send to PA via BAL-OUT
